title: Grafana 12 — Upgrade Overview
description: Single-pane landing page for the v12 demo suite. Links to every feature dashboard and shows version + health of the underlying lab.

options.content:
## Grafana 12 feature demos (24)

### 12.0
- [Drilldown Suite (Metrics / Logs / Traces / Profiles)](/d/v12-0-drilldown)
- [React Data Grid Table](/d/v12-0-table)
- [SQL Expressions](/d/v12-0-sql-expr)
- [Grafana-managed Recording Rules](/d/v12-0-recording-rules)
- [Scenes Chained Variables](/d/v12-0-scenes-vars)
- [Git Sync](/d/v12-0-git-sync)

### 12.1
- [Regression Transformation](/d/v12-1-regression)
- [Visualization Actions](/d/v12-1-viz-actions)
- [New Alert Rule Page](/d/v12-1-alert-rule-page)
- [Grafana Advisor](/d/v12-1-advisor)

### 12.2
- [Ad-hoc Filters (enhanced)](/d/v12-2-adhoc)
- [Logs JSON Viewer](/d/v12-2-logs-json)

### 12.3
- [Panel Time Drawer](/d/v12-3-time-drawer)
- [Switch Template Variable](/d/v12-3-switch-var)
- [Redesigned Logs Panel](/d/v12-3-logs-panel)

### 12.4
- [Multi-property Variables](/d/v12-4-multiprop)
- [Regex Variable Transforms](/d/v12-4-regex-vars)
- [Gauge Styles (Circular + Arc)](/d/v12-4-gauge)
- [OTLP Log Defaults](/d/v12-4-otlp)
- [HA Alertmanager Metric Rename](/d/v12-4-am-ha)
- [Traces Drilldown + TraceQL](/d/v12-4-traces-dd)
- [Profiles Drilldown + Flame Graph](/d/v12-4-profiles-dd)
- [Dynamic Dashboards (tabs + rows)](/d/v12-4-dynamic)

## Drilldown apps (Grafana 12 core)

These replaced Explore Metrics/Logs/Traces and went GA in 12.0:

- [Metrics Drilldown](/a/grafana-metricsdrilldown-app)
- [Logs Drilldown](/a/grafana-lokiexplore-app)
- [Traces Drilldown](/a/grafana-exploretraces-app)
- [Profiles Drilldown](/a/grafana-pyroscope-app)

## Administration

- [Feature toggles](/admin/featuretoggles) — assert every required toggle is on
- [Plugin catalog](/plugins) — 12.0 revamped install flow
- [Grafana Advisor](/a/grafana-advisor-app) — 12.1 plugin/DS/SSO checks
- [Alert rule page](/alerting/new/alerting) — 12.1 GA
- [Dashboards](/dashboards) — browse all

## Source of truth

This lab targets the canonical pins and features documented in `docs/01-breaking-changes-matrix.md` (30-item playbook). Any toggle or breaking change referenced there has a live validator in `validation/gate.py`.
